description:
Create five transaction tiddlers and a 'Financial Dashboard' tiddler to track business finances.

Income tiddlers (Tag: Income):
- 'Invoice - Website Redesign Acme' (amount field: 2500)
- 'Invoice - Logo Design TechStart' (amount field: 800)

Expense tiddlers (Tag: Expense):
- 'Adobe CC Subscription' (amount field: 55)
- 'AWS Hosting' (amount field: 120)
- 'New Ergonomic Chair' (amount field: 450)

The 'Financial Dashboard' tiddler must dynamically list all Income and Expense tiddlers and use TiddlyWiki filter logic to calculate and display:
- Total Income: [calculated amount]
- Total Expenses: [calculated amount]
- Net Profit: [calculated amount]

The dashboard must update automatically if new transactions are added; do not hardcode the numerical totals.
